title: MARION AND POLK EARLY LEARNING HUB - 211info
text: MARION AND POLK EARLY LEARNING HUB MARION AND POLK EARLY LEARNING HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports families and children with early learning, literacy, and parent education resources. Connects families to partner agencies. 2995 Ryan Drive SE Suite 100 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-17 Hours: Class times vary Email (971) 718-6330 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program Contact (971) 718-6330 Tiffany Gallagher [email protected] Other (971) 707-0472 Leslye Garcia Quevada [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Parenting Skills Classes School Readiness Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LANTERN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ODHS FAMILY VISITATION SUPPORT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE PUBLIC SAFETY - CAR SEAT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
